# Tickerplay

> Tickerplay designs and installs LED stock tickers, financial tickers, sports tickers, and custom LED ticker tapes for universities, brokerages, corporate floors, and venues.

Canonical site: https://www.tickerplay.com/

## Primary pages

- [/](https://www.tickerplay.com/): LED stock ticker displays and ticker tapes for real-time market, news, and sports data.
- [/about-us/](https://www.tickerplay.com/about-us/): About Tickerplay — LED ticker manufacturer and integrator.
- [/contact/](https://www.tickerplay.com/contact/): Contact Tickerplay for quotes and project consultation.
- [/led-stock-ticker/](https://www.tickerplay.com/led-stock-ticker/): LED stock ticker displays for trading floors and finance labs.
- [/led-financial-ticker/](https://www.tickerplay.com/led-financial-ticker/): Financial LED tickers for banks, brokerages, and wealth firms.
- [/led-sports-ticker/](https://www.tickerplay.com/led-sports-ticker/): Sports LED tickers for scores, live updates, and venues.
- [/led-news-ticker/](https://www.tickerplay.com/led-news-ticker/): News LED ticker tapes for headlines and breaking updates.
- [/led-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/led-ticker-tape/): Overview of LED ticker tape products and form factors.
- [/indoor-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/indoor-ticker-tape/): Indoor LED ticker tape solutions.
- [/outdoor-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/outdoor-ticker-tape/): Weather-resistant outdoor LED ticker tapes.
- [/flexible-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/flexible-ticker-tape/): Flexible LED ticker tapes for custom shapes.
- [/circular-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/circular-ticker-tape/): Circular LED ticker displays.
- [/custom-led-ticker-tape/](https://www.tickerplay.com/custom-led-ticker-tape/): Custom-angle and bespoke LED ticker installations.
- [/university-finance-lab/](https://www.tickerplay.com/university-finance-lab/): LED tickers for university finance labs and trading rooms.
- [/stock-brokerage-firms/](https://www.tickerplay.com/stock-brokerage-firms/): Ticker displays for stock brokerage firms.
- [/business-school/](https://www.tickerplay.com/business-school/): LED tickers for business schools.
- [/sports-bars/](https://www.tickerplay.com/sports-bars/): Sports ticker installations for sports bars and hospitality.
- [/blogs/](https://www.tickerplay.com/blogs/): Tickerplay news, guides, and industry articles.
- [/gallery/](https://www.tickerplay.com/gallery/): Installation gallery of Tickerplay LED ticker projects.
- [/ticker-models/](https://www.tickerplay.com/ticker-models/): Tickerplay LED ticker models and configurations.

## Blog

- [/blogs/](https://www.tickerplay.com/blogs/): Article index
- See https://www.tickerplay.com/sitemap-blog.xml for the full post list
